sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Short answers about Spellvault as an MTG price checker.

items.title: What is an MTG price checker?
items.description: An MTG price checker helps you review card prices quickly so you can make better buy, hold, or sell decisions.

items.title: Why use Spellvault for price checking?
items.description: Spellvault connects price checks to your real inventory, which makes the information more useful.

items.title: Can I check prices while tracking my collection?
items.description: Yes. That is one of the main reasons to use Spellvault instead of a disconnected price tool.

items.title: Is this useful for sellers too?
items.description: Yes. Price checks matter whether you collect, trade, or manage inventory for sale.
